# WebToolkitAI

> Free AI-era website tools that help website owners create, validate, and improve AI-readable site files for SEO, GEO, and AI search visibility.

Website: https://webtoolkitai.com/
Audience: SEO operators, Indie SaaS founders, AI builders, small business owners, agencies
Language: English

## Key Pages — Tools
- LLMs.txt Generator: https://webtoolkitai.com/
  Create a clean llms.txt file for any publicly accessible website.
- LLMs.txt Validator: https://webtoolkitai.com/llms-txt-validator/
  Validate an llms.txt file for structure, fields, URLs, and common publishing issues.
- AI Robots.txt Generator: https://webtoolkitai.com/ai-robots-txt-generator/
  Generate a robots.txt file to control AI crawler access — block or allow GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and more.
- FAQ Schema Generator: https://webtoolkitai.com/faq-schema-generator/
  Create FAQPage JSON-LD structured data for any webpage — supports multiple Q&A pairs and generates copy-ready HTML snippets.
- AI Search Readiness Checker: https://webtoolkitai.com/ai-search-readiness-checker/
  Audit a website for llms.txt, robots.txt, sitemap, structured data, and AI crawler policies — get a readiness score and copyable report.

## Key Pages — Guides
- How to Add FAQ Schema: https://webtoolkitai.com/how-to-add-faq-schema/
  Step-by-step guide with an interactive implementation checklist widget.
- FAQ Schema Examples: https://webtoolkitai.com/faq-schema-examples/
  Copy-ready FAQPage JSON-LD templates for SaaS, local business, documentation, and blog — tab-based with copy buttons.
- FAQ Schema JSON-LD Explained: https://webtoolkitai.com/faq-schema-json-ld/
  Understand the JSON-LD format, schema.org vocabulary, and field structure — includes a mini JSON formatter widget.
- FAQ Rich Results Deprecated: https://webtoolkitai.com/faq-rich-results-deprecated/
  Explains that Google FAQ rich results are discontinued in 2026 — includes a decision guide for keeping or removing FAQ schema.
- How to Create LLMs.txt: https://webtoolkitai.com/how-to-create-llms-txt/
  Step-by-step guide with an interactive pre-publish checklist widget.
- How to Validate LLMs.txt: https://webtoolkitai.com/how-to-validate-llms-txt/
  Understand readiness scores, fix common issues, and use the live score estimator.
- LLMs.txt Examples: https://webtoolkitai.com/llms-txt-examples/
  Copy-ready templates for SaaS, documentation, blog, and business websites.
- AI Crawlers and Robots.txt: https://webtoolkitai.com/robots-txt-ai-crawlers/
  Complete guide to AI crawler user agents, training vs. search crawlers, and filtering table.
- Block GPTBot Guide: https://webtoolkitai.com/block-gptbot-robots-txt/
  Step-by-step guide with copy-paste robots.txt snippets to block AI training crawlers.
- LLMs.txt vs Robots.txt: https://webtoolkitai.com/llms-txt-vs-robots-txt/
  Side-by-side comparison and decision widget — which file does your site need?
- AI Crawler User Agents: https://webtoolkitai.com/ai-crawler-user-agents/
  Full searchable list of AI crawler identifiers with blocking snippets.
- AI Search Readiness Checklist: https://webtoolkitai.com/ai-search-readiness-checklist/
  Interactive checklist with completion percentage tracking and copyable summary.
- AI Search Visibility Score: https://webtoolkitai.com/ai-search-visibility-score/
  Simplified score estimator with answer-based scoring and improvement suggestions.
- How to Improve AI Search Visibility: https://webtoolkitai.com/how-to-improve-ai-search-visibility/
  7-day action plan with priority planner and day-by-day tasks.
- AI Search Readiness Report Template: https://webtoolkitai.com/ai-search-readiness-report-template/
  Editable audit report template with copy and download functionality.
